name: PhD Student Research Journey with Emotional Scoring
input: Create a user journey map for a PhD student completing their dissertation. Section Application Phase: Submit application 5, Wait for acceptance 2, Receive offer 5, Relocate to university 3. Section Coursework Year: Attend seminars 4, Choose advisor 5, Pass qualifying exam 3, Form dissertation committee 4. Section Research Phase: Literature review 4, Develop methodology 3, Collect data 2, Analyze results 3, Hit major setback and pivot 1, Redesign study 2, Collect new data 3, Breakthrough finding 5. Section Writing Phase: Draft chapters 2, Advisor revisions round 1 3, Advisor revisions round 2 3, Submit to committee 4, Defend dissertation 5. Section Post-Defense: Submit final revisions 4, Graduate 5, Celebrate 5. Show 6 sections with at least 22 tasks and emotional scoring from 1-5.
qualityCriteria: At least 20 task entries with scores
Scores range from 1 to 5 across different tasks
Research phase section with setback scoring low (1-2)
Emotional arc visible — high start, low mid-research, high end
Valid Mermaid syntax that parses without errors
napkinBenchmark: Journey with 6 sections, 22+ tasks, scores 1-5, PhD emotional arc from excitement through struggle to triumph.
